_metadata.name: Incident Response Triage
_metadata.description: Automated incident response workflow that collects alert data, enriches indicators of compromise (IOCs) via VirusTotal and AbuseIPDB, generates a severity assessment, and creates a ticket with findings. Accelerates SOC analyst response time.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Incident Response Triage
manifest.description: Enrich IOCs, assess severity, and create tickets automatically on security alerts.
manifest.author: sentris-team

data.description: Triggered when a security alert is received (webhook, SIEM, etc.)
Parse alert payload and extract IP addresses, domains, and file hashes

config.script: const alert = input; const ips = alert.indicators?.filter(i => i.type === 'ip') || []; const domains = alert.indicators?.filter(i => i.type === 'domain') || []; const hashes = alert.indicators?.filter(i => i.type === 'hash') || []; return { ips, domains, hashes, alertId: alert.id, severity: alert.severity };

data.description: Query VirusTotal for reputation data on extracted IOCs
Check IP addresses against AbuseIPDB for known malicious activity
Combine enrichment data and calculate a risk score for the incident

config.script: const vt = input.virustotal; const abuse = input.abuseipdb; const riskScore = (vt?.malicious || 0) * 10 + (abuse?.confidenceScore || 0); const severity = riskScore > 80 ? 'critical' : riskScore > 50 ? 'high' : riskScore > 20 ? 'medium' : 'low'; return { riskScore, severity, enrichment: { virustotal: vt, abuseipdb: abuse } };

data.description: Create a ticket in the incident management system with enriched findings
Alert the SOC team in Slack with incident summary and ticket link

requiredSecrets.name: virustotal_api_key
requiredSecrets.description: VirusTotal API key for threat intelligence lookups

requiredSecrets.name: abuseipdb_api_key
requiredSecrets.description: AbuseIPDB API key for IP reputation checks

requiredSecrets.name: slack_webhook_url
requiredSecrets.description: Slack incoming webhook URL for SOC notifications
